outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: A day on the brink with Iran ended with a TACO and grave constitutional questions
outlets.summary: Skeptical framing questioning whether anything fundamentally changed. Jake Tapper asked guests if there's 'anything fundamentally different today from yesterday' — all said no.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: U.S. and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire, suspending Trump's threat to annihilate Iran
outlets.summary: Framed as suspension of existential threat. Focus on the dramatic before/after of Trump's civilization death threat.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump pauses planned Iran attack, cites progress toward peace deal
outlets.summary: Favorable framing of Trump's decision as strategic pause. Emphasis on Hormuz reopening as achievement.

outlets.name: PJ Media
outlets.headline: Iran launched missiles at Israel amid ceasefire announcement
outlets.summary: Focus on Iran violating ceasefire immediately, questioning Iran's sincerity.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: World welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, urges lasting peace in the Middle East
outlets.summary: Comprehensive coverage of global reactions. Focus on diplomatic dimension and Pakistan mediation role.

outlets.name: Reuters/Investing.com
outlets.headline: Oil dives, stocks surge as Trump agrees to two-week ceasefire
outlets.summary: Market-focused coverage. Biggest oil crash since 1991.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Iran violates ceasefire agreement hours after Trump announces truce
outlets.summary: Lead with Iran's missile barrage violating ceasefire. Skeptical tone about Iran's compliance.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel to Respect Cease-fire, but Officials Wary of Emerging Deal
outlets.summary: Cautious Israeli establishment view. Officials wary of Iran's 10-point plan and ceasefire durability.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran declares 'historic victory' over US, says enemy forced to accept its proposal
outlets.summary: Iranian state media frames ceasefire as total Iranian victory. Claims US was 'forced to accept' Iran's 10-point plan.

outlets.name: Xinhua (IRNA)
outlets.headline: Key points of Iran's official statement on ceasefire with U.S.
outlets.summary: Neutral carrying of IRNA/Iranian official statement. Focus on ceasefire terms and 10-point proposal.
